EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Updates are available for host {datafield6} on host {event_src.host}
A check for updates for host {datafield6} is started on host {event_src.host}
A check for updates for host {datafield6} is finished on host {event_src.host}
Unable to check for updates for host {datafield6} on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
